steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Count the relevant faces, dimensions, or scale factor before setting up equations. Lengths scale by $k$, areas by $k^2$, and volumes by $k^3$; for boxes and prisms, write the needed face or volume formula directly.

steps.title: Recognize the operation
steps.content: When area is removed from a rectangle, subtract the removed area from the original area to find what remains.

steps.title: Calculate the remaining area
steps.content:
Area of rectangle P minus area of removed rectangle:
$$72 - 20 = 52$$
The resulting figure has area $52$ square inches. That confirms D is correct.
